Tank.description: Tank heroes boost ground armored units. Use in Tank lineups only.

front_row_defense.note: Violet is SSR but upgrades to UR in Season 2. Do NOT upgrade her during S2 as you lose SSR buffs.

back_row_attack_support.note: Marshall is SSR but upgrades to UR in Season 1.

Tank.gear_priority_note: Kimberly gets gear first as primary damage dealer

Murphy.exclusive_weapon: Ironclad Barrier - adds Mitigation stacks to allies
Murphy.synergy_notes: Pairs well with damage dealers Kimberly/Stetmann. Mitigation stacks protect all Tank heroes.

Williams.synergy_notes: Best paired with Murphy for dual-front defense. Allows back-row heroes to deal uninterrupted damage.

Kimberly.synergy_notes: Maximizes damage when frontline tanks absorb damage. Pairs with Murphy for Mitigation synergy.

Stetmann.synergy_notes: AoE works best when enemies are grouped (defense against rallies). Complements Kimberly's burst.

Marshall.exclusive_weapon: Command Strategy - increases attack of entire squad for 8 seconds
Marshall.core_skill: Command Strategy (Tactics skill) - primary priority for upgrade
Marshall.cross_type_note: Confirmed in Code Boss squads: Marshall appears in Tank, Aircraft, AND Missile Code Boss formations - his attack buff applies across troop types
Marshall.kb_source: code_boss.json - appears in all 3 boss squads

Mason.synergy_notes: Works best in boss scenarios (Code Boss, Doom Walker). Not essential for PvP.

Aircraft.description: Aircraft heroes boost aerial units. Use in Aircraft lineups only.
Aircraft.gear_priority_note: DVA gets gear first as primary damage dealer

Carlie.exclusive_weapon: Pebble Strike - summons pet when fallen (unreliable)
Carlie.synergy_notes: Pebble mechanic only triggers on death - not reliable. Focus on her lv1/lv10 passive effects instead.

Lucius.synergy_notes: Paired with Carlie for dual-front. Allows DVA to deal consistent back-row damage.

DVA.synergy_notes: Maximizes damage when frontline defends. Exclusive Weapon prioritize after Tank lineup.

Schuyler.synergy_notes: AoE effective in rallies and sieges. Complements DVA's burst.

Morrison.synergy_notes: Lower priority than Carlie/Lucius. Upgrade AFTER primary Aircraft stack is 4-star+.

Missile.description: Missile heroes boost missile/rocket units. Use in Missile lineups only.
Missile.gear_priority_note: Tesla gets gear first as primary damage dealer

McGregor.synergy_notes: Only UR Missile defense. Pairs with Tesla for Missile squad depth.

Tesla.synergy_notes: Best damage output in Missile lineup. Gear Tesla first before Swift.

Swift.exclusive_weapon: Winning Pursuit - triggers extra attacks on most-burned enemy
Swift.synergy_notes: Burn DoT scales with Missile count. Weapon prioritize after Tesla (Winning Pursuit at lv30 is powerful).

Fiona.synergy_notes: Third DPS option. Lower priority than Tesla/Swift for early investment.

lineup_rule: Always match heroes to your primary troop type. Using off-type heroes reduces lineup effectiveness. Never recommend a Tank hero for an Aircraft or Missile player.

front_row.note: Always place Defense-role heroes in front row to absorb damage. Never put Attack heroes in front row.

back_row.note: Attack heroes deal damage from protected back row. Support heroes buff the squad.

formation_bonuses.5_same_type: +20% HP, Attack and Defense — target for all competitive play

key_notes: UR heroes significantly outperform SSR at equivalent investment
Violet (Tank SSR) upgrades to UR in Season 2 — do NOT upgrade during S2, wait until end of season
Marshall (Tank SSR) upgrades to UR in Season 1
Always concentrate gear on your top DPS hero first, never spread evenly
Front row gear = Armor + Radar. Back row gear = Railgun + Chip
Never mix troop types without good reason — formation bonus drops significantly
